'''Tallis''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who governed the [[Parmel sector/Legends|Parmel sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Char-stub}}
